title: US Aluminum Smelter Idled Since 2024 to Restart as Trump Looks to Revive Industry
title_cn: 特朗普希望重振工业，自 2024 年以来闲置的美国铝冶炼厂将重新启动
summary: An idled aluminum smelter in Missouri will restart production before the end of this year, helping to boost output of the metal amid the Trump administration’s push to revive the domestic industry.

summary: Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures lifted most stocks in the US, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.

title: US Crude Grades Shed Iran War Premium as Energy Crisis Eases
title_cn: 随着能源危机缓解，美国原油等级下降了伊朗战争溢价
summary: Key US oil grades have slumped to trade at a discount again as a gush of crude flows through the Strait of Hormuz and a recent spike in demand for American exports fades.

title: ECB’s Stournaras Sees Smaller Likelihood of Further Rate Hike
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长斯托纳拉斯认为进一步加息的可能性较小
summary: The unexpectedly large fall in energy prices alongside slowing euro-zone inflation suggest the European Central Bank may not have to add to June’s interest-rate increase, Governing Council member Yannis Stournaras said.

title: BlackRock’s Tseng to Exit as CEO of Troubled Private Credit Fund
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 曾恩将辞去陷入困境的私人信贷基金首席执行官一职
summary: The head of BlackRock Inc.’s beleaguered private credit fund is in the process of leaving the firm, a move that follows months of losses on soured loans and revelations of a US regulatory probe into the unit’s valuation practices.

title: Warsh Signals Inflation Progress | Open Interest 7/1/2026
title_cn: 沃什暗示通胀进展|未平仓合约 7/1/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Fed Chair Kevin Warsh takes center stage in Sintra with fresh signals on inflation and price stability, while the ECB weighs the global outlook. Plus, Anthropic's Fable 5 gets the green light as Meta accelerates its AI cloud push.  National Grid CEO Zoë Yujnovich joins Open Interest on her company's role in powering the AI boom, and EQT's Eric Liu on where private equity is finding the next AI winners. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungarian Mayor Tells Battery Maker to Leave Over Pollution Case
title_cn: 匈牙利市长要求电池制造商放弃污染案件
summary: The mayor of Hungary’s second-largest city called on Chinese battery-parts maker Semcorp to walk away from a new, 65 billion-forint ($210 million) factory that’s been closed for alleged environmental violations.

title: Peru Inflation Unexpectedly Picks Up With Rising Food Prices
title_cn: 秘鲁通胀因食品价格上涨而意外上升
summary: Inflation in Peru’s capital unexpectedly accelerated in June, staying above the central bank’s target range for a fourth straight month as rising food costs add to the recent global energy shock.

title: Emerging-Market Currencies Erase 2026 Gains as Dollar Advances
title_cn: 随着美元升值，新兴市场货币抹去了 2026 年的涨幅
summary: A gauge for emerging-market currencies erased its gains for this year, with speculation over higher US interest rates sparking a resurgence in the dollar.

title: Slovakia to Revive Aluminum Plant That Was Once a Top Producer
title_cn: 斯洛伐克将重振曾经是顶级生产商的铝厂
summary: Slovakia is set to revive primary aluminum production at a plant that was once one of Europe’s biggest producers of the metal.

title: Oil Falls on Growing Signs of Oversupply, Progress in Iran Talks
title_cn: 供应过剩迹象日益明显，伊朗谈判取得进展，油价下跌
summary: Oil extended its run of declines on growing signs of oversupply, with traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovering and some of the impacts of the Iran war continuing to fade.

title: Trump’s $1.4 Billion Haul Makes Him Biggest US Crypto Moneymaker
title_cn: 特朗普 14 亿美元的收入使他成为美国最大的加密货币摇钱树
summary: Donald Trump, who reversed his early skepticism of crypto to become one of the industry’s biggest boosters, reported more crypto-related income last year than any publicly traded US digital-asset company earned.

title: Overpricing Fed Rate Hikes Amid Potential Cuts
title_cn: 美联储在可能降息的情况下加息定价过高
summary: The segment discusses the current market sentiment that appears to be overestimating the likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. Reference is made to the '12th blue dot,' a hypothetical addition to the Fed's dot plot that would represent a signal for rate cuts this year, attributed to former Fed official Warsh. This suggests that despite market expectations, JPMorgan analysts anticipate the Federal Reserve will keep rates on hold throughout the year. The discussion highlights the impact of these expectations on stock market performance, with stocks falling as investor focus shifts toward the possibility of policy changes signaled by Warsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Edge Lower as Traders Weigh Policy Signals
title_cn: 交易员权衡政策信号，欧洲股市小幅走低
summary: European stocks closed well off session lows on Wednesday after policymakers gathered at the European Central Bank’s annual forum signaled they will not rush to raise interest rates.

title: Brightline Hurtles Toward Debt Deadline With No Plan in Place
title_cn: Brightline 正在逼近债务期限，但尚未制定任何计划
summary: It’s a date that lenders to Brightline, the debt-laden private Florida railroad, have had circled for months: July 1. That’s when the company will likely look to scrounge up what’s left in reserves to pay bondholders and stave off a formal default for the last time.

title: Warsh Taps Ex-BOE Chief King for New Fed Communications Task Force
title_cn: 沃什任命前英国央行首席国王为新的美联储通讯工作组
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has tapped former Bank of England Governor Mervyn King to co-chair the US central bank’s new task force on communications.

title: UAE Oil Flows Hit Pre-War Levels on Dark Ships and Hormuz Bypass
title_cn: 阿联酋黑船和霍尔木兹绕道石油流量达到战前水平
summary: The United United Arab Emirates has restored its oil exports to pre-war levels by sneaking tankers through the Strait of Hormuz undetected and using a pipeline that bypasses the waterway.

title: BlackRock Says Past Defaults, Next Election Cap Argentina Rally
title_cn: 贝莱德称过去的违约，下一次选举上限阿根廷集会
summary: Argentina’s stellar bond rally is set to hit a wall as next year’s presidential elections revive concern over the country’s turbulent economic past, according to Pablo Goldberg, an emerging markets portfolio manager at BlackRock Inc.

title: This Heatwave Needs to Be Taken Seriously
title_cn: 需要认真对待这股热浪
summary: The heatwave hitting the US right now needs to be taken seriously. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Mark Gongloff has advice on staying cool and how to detect heat exhaustion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Small Caps Track Largest S&P 500 Lead Since 2003
title_cn: 小盘股追踪标准普尔 500 指数自 2003 年以来的最大领先优势
summary:
The Russell 2000 has outperformed the S&P 500 by almost 14 percentage points during the first six months of this year. Should such a performance gap hold into year-end, it would be the largest in over 20 years.
Jill Carey Hall, Equity Strategist and Head: US SMID Strategy at Bank of America, discusses her mid-year outlook for small cap stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Rise as Traders Weigh Warsh Remarks, Manufacturing
title_cn: 交易员权衡沃什言论和制造业，美国股市上涨
summary: US stocks pared earlier losses as fresh economic data painted a picture of resilience, while traders assessed commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh.

title: One Almost-Goldilocks Report
title_cn: 一份几乎金发姑娘的报告
summary: While we wait for the jobs data.

title: New York, Chicago Grids Strain as Record Heat Wave Expands
title_cn: 创纪录的热浪蔓延，纽约和芝加哥电网紧张
summary:
Power grids from Chicago to New York City are bracing for sky-high demand as sweltering heat begins to build across the eastern half of the US.  
Bloomberg News Meteorologist Rob Carolan breaks down what to expect as temperatures rise. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Bounce on Manufacturing, Warsh’s Remarks
title_cn: 沃什的言论推动制造业股市反弹
summary:
Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures spurred a bounce in stocks from session lows, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.
Jordan Jackson, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, gives his macro call and discusses the market reaction he expects to see from Thursday's jobs data. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trans-Oil Seeks to Calm Investors Rattled by Ukraine Report
title_cn: Trans-Oil 寻求安抚因乌克兰报告而感到不安的投资者
summary: Trans-Oil Group is organizing calls with bondholders rattled by a report alleging that the founder of the Moldovan grains company breached sanctions on Iran.

title: Nike Appoints Pfizer CFO as New Finance Chief Amid Industry Experience Questions
title_cn: 耐克任命辉瑞首席财务官为新任财务主管，以应对行业经验问题
summary: Nina Trentmann, Senior Editor at Bloomberg News, discussed the recent appointment of Dave Denton, formerly Pfizer's CFO, as Nike's new Finance Chief. While some analysts have expressed concerns about Denton's lack of direct retail and apparel industry experience, Trentmann noted that for large companies like Nike and Pfizer, deep industry knowledge may be less critical than experience managing a complex, global business with a significant market capitalization and extensive supply chains. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space (Correct)
title_cn: 太空数据中心建设竞赛（正确）
summary: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier. (Corrects reference to 16-square-kilometer solar array at 3:26 in video originally published on June 15.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta to Build Cloud Business to Sell Excess AI Compute | Bloomberg Tech 7/01/2026
title_cn: Meta 建立云业务以出售多余的人工智能计算 |彭博科技 7/01/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Meta's plans to develop its own cloud infrastructure business aimed at selling access to AI computing power and models. Plus, the Trump administration lifts foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model. And, Lime CEO Wayne Ting joins as the company gets ready to debut on the Nasdaq. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What’s Behindthe US Dollar’s “Explosive” Rally?
title_cn: 美元“爆发式”上涨的背后是什么？
summary: Just months ago, investors were selling the dollar against the euro to Bitcoin and gold. Now the dollar is rallying. So what’s changed? Ruth Carson explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Power Crunch Has Investors Seeking Next IPO Winners
title_cn: 人工智能电力紧缩让投资者寻找下一个 IPO 获胜者
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.

title: Marlinspike Raises New Fund to Back Defense, Industrial Startups
title_cn: Marlinspike 筹集新资金支持国防和工业初创企业
summary: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber-Backed Lime Raises $174 Million in Public Debut
title_cn: Uber 支持的 Lime 首次公开募资 1.74 亿美元
summary: The IPO window is showing more signs of life, with Uber-backed Lime raising $174 million in its public debut, pricing its shares right at the midpoint of the expected range. Lime CEO Wayne Ting says the company is going public to attract new investors, and is thinking about M&A, though "the bar is high." He joins Ed Ludlow from the Nasdaq on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5
title_cn: 美国取消对《Anthropic》《神鬼寓言5》的出口限制
summary: The Trump administration has lifted foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model after the company addressed government safety concerns. Allie Mellen, principal analyst at Forrester, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss how Washington regulates frontier AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Limits on Anthropic’s Mythos Keep Foreign Firms in Limbo
title_cn: 美国对人类神话的限制使外国公司陷入困境
summary: Foreign governments, companies and financial institutions were left in limbo after the Trump administration continued to restrict access to Anthropic PBC’s Mythos 5 to a limited number of US organizations even after dropping export controls on the company’s latest artificial intelligence models.

title: Inside Meta’s $900 Million India Gamble
title_cn: Meta 在印度豪赌 9 亿美元的内幕
summary: Meta has appointed CRED founder Kunal Shah to help lead WhatsApp globally as it tries to turn the app into a financial powerhouse. Bloomberg Opinion’s Andy Mukherjee explains why India is the key to that strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity Bets on AI Growth
title_cn: 私募股权押注人工智能增长
summary: Eric Liu, the Co-Head of Private Capital at EQT, joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how AI is reshaping private equity investing, why software companies face a growing divide between AI winners and losers, and how his firm manages regulatory risk in technology and healthcare. He also shares why high-quality assets continue to trade despite a slower private equity exit market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Wealth: Rick Wurster
title_cn: 彭博财富：里克·沃斯特
summary: Charles Schwab has grown from a small discount brokerage into one of the largest financial services firms in the world. In this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth, President and CEO Rick Wurster joins David Rubenstein to discuss the company's 50-year mission of making investing more accessible, how Schwab now oversees $13 trillion in client assets, and why he believes long-term investing continues to outperform trying to time the market. Wurster also shares leadership lessons from Schwab himself, and explains how the firm is navigating the future of investing. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: National Grid's Big Bet on US AI Power Firm
title_cn: 国家电网大举押注美国人工智能电力公司
summary: National Grid CEO Zoë Yujnovich discusses the company's strategic $1.75 billion investment in Jouleant, a US-based AI power firm, emphasizing the growing importance of AI-driven electricity demand. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WhatsApp’s New Feature Has Defenses Against Scams, Meta Says
title_cn: Meta 称 WhatsApp 的新功能可防御诈骗
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. said Wednesday it’ll allow high-profile names to be only claimed by legitimate owners as part of its effort to counter impersonation on WhatsApp’s new username feature.

title: Meta Cloud Business; NASA Lunar Lander Contracts | Stock Movers
title_cn: 元云业务；美国宇航局月球着陆器合同|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- Space companies including FireFly Aerospace (FLY) Intuitive Machines (LUNR) and Voyager Technologies (VOYG) shares are moving on news that NASA selected three companies to send robotic landers to the moon as part of efforts to establish a lunar base before the end of the decade. The agency announced awards to Astrobotic Technology Inc., Firefly Aerospace Inc., and Intuitive Machines Inc. to send landers to the moon.
- General Mills (GIS) shares are moving after it posted fourth-quarter profit that beat Wall Street expectations, lifted by higher prices.
- Meta Platforms Inc. (META) gained on reports that the company is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business that will sell access to AI computing power and models. The company is also considering selling access to “raw” computing capacity, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Is Planning Cloud Business to Take on Amazon, Google
title_cn: Meta 正在计划云业务挑战亚马逊和谷歌
summary: Meta Platforms is developing plans to build a cloud infrastructure business that would sell access to AI computing power and models. It would take on industry leaders like Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud. Mandeep Singh of Bloomberg Intelligence has details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nissan CEO on Autonomous Driving, Making Cars in US
title_cn: 日产首席执行官谈自动驾驶、在美国制造汽车
summary: Nissan Motor Co. President and CEO Ivan Espinosa talks about the future of autonomous driving, investing in the US and how tariffs are making it harder to sell Mexican-made cars in the US. Those cars are being tariffed at a 25% rate. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing Power
title_cn: Meta 正在规划云业务以销售 AI 算力
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business that will sell access to AI computing power and models, setting up a new vector of competition with industry leaders like Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud.

title: Video Search Startup Raises $100 Million From Amazon and VCs
title_cn: 视频搜索初创公司从亚马逊和风险投资公司筹集了 1 亿美元
summary: Twelve Labs Co. is raising $100 million from investors including Amazon.com Inc., NEA Management Co. and Naver Ventures, boosting its efforts to develop artificial intelligence that can quickly search and analyze troves of video.

title: Krafton Agrees to Pay ‘Subnautica 2’ Bonuses as Developer’s CEO Resigns
title_cn: 随着开发商首席执行官辞职，Krafton 同意支付《深海迷航 2》奖金
summary: After being fired over a $250 million payout dispute and then reinstated, Unknown Worlds Entertainment boss Ted Gill is leaving again

title: Uber Shakes Up AI Data Labeling Business, Dismissing Top Leaders
title_cn: Uber 重组人工智能数据标签业务，解雇高层领导
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has dismissed two tech leaders at its nascent AI data labeling business, shaking up a key division that the ride-hail company has positioned as a key growth driver.

title: Lagarde Says Risks to Inflation, Growth More Broadly Balanced
title_cn: 拉加德称通胀风险，增长更广泛平衡
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said risks to euro-area inflation and growth have become more broadly balanced during the ECB's annual retreat in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony to End Production of Physical PlayStation Discs in 2028
title_cn: 索尼将于 2028 年停止生产 PlayStation 实体光盘
summary: Sony Group Corp. will end production of physical discs for its PlayStation video-game consoles starting in January 2028, going all in on a digital approach that will require consumers to download titles from the company’s online storefront moving forward.

title: A Giant Cable Exposes Ireland’s AI Ambitions and Security Risks
title_cn: 一根巨型电缆暴露了爱尔兰的人工智能野心和安全风险
summary: A new Amazon transatlantic fiber-optic link is symbolic of the country’s tech economy, but also of its chronic lack of defense spending.

title: Google Told to Pay Klarna Nearly $2 Billion in Shopping Spat
title_cn: 谷歌被要求向克拉纳支付近 20 亿美元的购物纠纷
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google was ordered to pay almost $2 billion to Klarna Group Plc’s Pricerunner unit in a dispute over the search-engine giant’s abuse of power in the market for comparison shopping services.

title: Taiwan Detains Super Micro Workers in China Chip Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾在中国芯片走私调查中拘留超微工人
summary: Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees following a raid of the US company’s local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China.

title: Wayve Files for Share Sale on LSE’s New Private Market
title_cn: Wayve 申请在伦敦证券交易所新私人市场出售股票
summary: Autonomous driving software company Wayve Technologies Ltd. has filed to sell shares on the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Securities Market, the first major company to test the novel system.

title: Bending Spoons IPO Turns Italian College Pals Into Billionaires
title_cn: Bending Spoons IPO 让意大利大学好友成为亿万富翁
summary: Four former college friends who founded software rollup Bending Spoons SpA have emerged as Italy’s youngest cohort of self-made billionaires.

title: Oracle Warns Its Splurge on AI Data Centers May Not Pay Off
title_cn: 甲骨文警告称，其在人工智能数据中心上的投入可能不会得到回报
summary: The company outlines the risks of its massive cloud build-out to meet AI demand

title: AI, Forging New Risks, Isn’t a Market Wizard After All
title_cn: 人工智能，带来新的风险，毕竟不是市场向导
summary: More studies are trying to answer the question: what if everyone uses the same AI tool?

title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
title_cn: 美国决定不再续签USMCA，转向滚动谈判
summary: The US won’t renew its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a decision that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America.

title: Ex-CIA Director Brennan Alleges ‘Vindictive’ DOJ Criminal Probe
title_cn: 前中央情报局局长布伦南声称司法部刑事调查具有“报复性”
summary: Former CIA Director John Brennan sued the Trump administration, asking a federal judge to ensure government records are preserved in case he’s criminally indicted so he can seek to prove the charges are “vindictive.”

title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
title_cn: 美国决定不再续签USMCA，转向滚动谈判
summary:
The US decided against renewing its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a move that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America.
The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, will remain in force for another a decade provided no one country decides to exit. Annual reviews instead of a longer-term renewal open the door to years of contentious negotiations. Bloomberg National Security Reporter Nick Wadhams says this change is because Trump wants to change the deal.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Agents Nab Member of Group That Brought Hasan Piker to Cuba
title_cn: 美国特工抓获将哈桑·皮克带到古巴的组织成员
summary: A Cuban national accused of being part of a sprawling influence network that brought US political streamer Hasan Piker to Havana has been detained along with his family and will be deported.

title: US Won't Renew USMCA Trade Deal
title_cn: 美国不会续签USMCA贸易协议
summary: The US decided against renewing its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact. That's according to US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, who spoke to Bloomberg News on Wednesday. The USMCA will stay in tact for another decade, unless a country decides to exit. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USDA to Fund $500 Million to ‘Fast Track’ Fertilizer Plants
title_cn: 美国农业部将资助 5 亿美元用于“快速通道”化肥厂
summary: The US Department of Agriculture will invest $500 million in new and existing fertilizer facilities to “fast track” more production in America, Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins said in a press conference Wednesday.

title: Trump Hails Qatar Meetings on Iran as Talks Set to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普称赞卡塔尔就伊朗问题举行的会议将继续进行
summary: US President Donald Trump said negotiators had made progress in indirect talks with Iran, as the two countries seek to move past last week’s tit-for-tat strikes and convert their interim truce into a lasting peace.

title: Asylum Seekers Sue Over ICE Requiring More Tracking Devices
title_cn: 寻求庇护者起诉 ICE 要求更多追踪设备
summary: A group of migrants seeking US asylum or visas is suing over a new Trump administration policy requiring them to wear tracking monitors as an alternative to detention, claiming the measure is causing unnecessary harm to people trying to remain in the country legally.

title: US Sees 10 Million Barrels Via Hormuz Sapping Iran Oil Leverage
title_cn: 美国通过霍尔木兹海峡运输1000万桶石油，削弱伊朗石油杠杆
summary: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has surged over the past few weeks, with American military support helping boost oil flows to more than 10 million barrels per day, a US official said.

title: House Speaker Asks Trump to Let Jones Act Shipping Waiver Expire
title_cn: 众议院议长要求特朗普让琼斯法案航运豁免到期
summary: Speaker Mike Johnson and other Republicans in the US House of Representatives are asking President Donald Trump to allow a waiver of a century-old shipping law granted in March to tame fuel prices to expire.

title: Ships Cross Hormuz in Convoy Formation as Gulf Oil Keeps Flowing
title_cn: 海湾石油持续流动，船只组成护航队穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Two large convoys of commercial ships were observed crossing the Strait of Hormuz, one of the clearest examples yet of what appears to be an increasingly common navigational tactic to keep maritime traffic safe.

title: White House Adds Pandemic Response Staff as Ebola Cases Rise
title_cn: 随着埃博拉病例上升，白宫增加了流行病应对人员
summary: The Trump administration brought on two new pandemic response officials at the White House as the administration faces multiple infectious disease threats, a White House spokesperson confirmed.

title: US Sanctions Two Brazilians, Four Firms Linked to Drug Cartel
title_cn: 美国制裁两名巴西人和四家与贩毒集团有关的公司
summary: The US Treasury Department sanctioned two Brazilian nationals, three Brazilian companies and one Portuguese company for allegedly helping launder proceeds for Latin America’s largest criminal organization.

title: Colombia’s Incoming Finance Minister Pledges Fiscal Austerity
title_cn: 哥伦比亚新​​任财政部长承诺财政紧缩
summary: Colombia’s incoming finance minister is pledging to implement tighter fiscal policy, warning that the nation’s budget deficit is significantly wider than official figures suggest.

title: Ukraine’s Missiles Now Have Almost Half of Russia in Reach
title_cn: 乌克兰的导弹现在几乎可以到达俄罗斯的一半
summary: Ukraine has expanded the range and intensity of its missile strikes inside Russia, triggering alerts across nearly half of the regions in the world’s largest country so far this year.

title: US Sees NATO With Benefits for Countries That Spend More on Arms
title_cn: 美国认为北约将为那些在军备上花费更多的国家带来好处
summary: The US floated the idea of granting political and economic benefits to NATO allies that spend more on defense, raising the prospect of a two-tier alliance just before leaders gather for an annual summit.

title: Takaichi Lands in India to Boost Ties as China Tensions Rise
title_cn: 随着中国紧张局势升级，高市登陆印度以促进两国关系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi arrived in India Wednesday for a three-day trip to deepen economic ties and strengthen security cooperation with counterpart Narendra Modi as the two Asian powers seek to wean off dependence on China.

title: Funds Run My Money, I Don’t Get Involved Says Trump (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普说，基金管理我的钱，我不参与（问答）
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure. “I’ve made a lot of money before I became president, and they invest my money, and I don’t talk to them,” he said when he spoke to reporters before boarding AF1 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Suggests Budget Buffer Can Absorb Defense Spend Gap
title_cn: 斯塔默建议预算缓冲可以吸收国防支出缺口
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer suggested there’s room in the next UK budget to absorb a £4.7 billion ($6.2 billion) gap in spending that was revealed in the country’s defense investment plan, published on Tuesday.

title: Fed Chairman Warsh Says Inflation Risks Have Come Down, Vows to Be Independent
title_cn: 美联储主席沃什称通胀风险已下降，誓言保持独立
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said price risks have come down in recent weeks, and the central bank will deliver price stability. “Prices are too high, and I don’t think I’m the only one on this stage that’s recommitted to deliver price stability," Warsh said on Wednesday at the European Central Bank’s annual Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: California’s Return to Office Mandate for 90,000 State Workers Sets Up Union Clash
title_cn: 加州要求 9 万名州政府工作人员重返办公室引发工会冲突
summary: The pandemic-era workweek is finally coming to an end for tens of thousands of California state workers.

title: Texas Public Schools Fight to Keep Students as Vouchers Roll Out
title_cn: 德克萨斯州公立学校推出优惠券，努力留住学生
summary: Texas is launching a school-choice program long fought for by Governor Greg Abbott. Public schools around the state are hoping they can avoid a potentially costly student exodus.

title: Trump Says 'Funds Run My Money,' And He Was Rich Before
title_cn: 特朗普说“资金运行我的钱”，他以前很富有
summary: “We have funds that run my money,” President Donald Trump tells reporters when asked about his financial disclosures that show he made $1.4 billion in 2025 on crypto and memecoin-related businesses. He spoke at Joint Base Andrews on Wednesday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Milei Tries Again to Revive Argentina’s Dormant Mortgage Market
title_cn: Milei 再次尝试重振阿根廷休眠的抵押贷款市场
summary: President Javier Milei is trying to tackle Argentina’s longstanding lack of home mortgages in a bid to turn around a construction sector that’s losing jobs before his reelection bid next year.

title: Merz Sees ‘Giant Leap’ on Reforms as Coalition Meets in Berlin
title_cn: 默茨认为联盟党在柏林召开会议时改革将取得“巨大飞跃”
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz expressed confidence that his coalition will deliver on a comprehensive set of reforms this week as leaders in his coalition meet in Berlin to draw up a legislative blueprint.

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益至少为 14 亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: Johannesburg Faces $128 Million Funding Gap as Its Bills Mount
title_cn: 随着账单不断增加，约翰内斯堡面临 1.28 亿美元的资金缺口
summary: Johannesburg is starting a new financial year with a multibillion-rand budget that’s not fully funded, potentially deepening a crisis that’s already left it unable to pay for power and fuel supplies.
